SQLLite.SQL: SELECT AE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "EventId" ,AE.EVENT_DATE AS "EventDate" ,AE.SERVICE_DATE AS "ServiceDate" ,'true' AS "RecordedAgainstAe" ,( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM AE_EVENTS AE1 WHERE AE1.EVENT_DATE > AE.EVENT_DATE AND AE1.AE_NUMBER = AE.AE_NUMBER AND AE1.STD_EVENT_ID IN ('858', '859', '878', '879') AND AE1.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' ) AS "ResponseFiled" FROM AE_EVENTS AE WHERE AE.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId} AND AE.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND AE.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y'
